author: Doggles
body:
OK so I’m commenting on an old post here but just had to recommend one of my favourite books on this subject, and that’s “The God Delusion” by Richard Dawkins – check it out guys – if you’re a religious person then your faith should be strong enough to withstand such a simple human thing like logical reasoning, shouldn’t it?… give it a try you might like it, heh heh… if you’re a rational person then it’s a great read – I don’t agree with everything in there myself – but then that’s kind of the point – to make your own mind up about these things. It’s a fearless a eloquently argued case – [http://www.richarddawkins.net](http://www.richarddawkins.net/).

Peace.

author: Burgo
body:
Hey Doggles,  
Heh… not just an old post, the very first post on this blog (which is strange, when you consider it has nothing to do with music. Funny how these things take their own course!)  
Thanks for stopping by with the comment though… I’m sure Richard Dawkins will polarise some of the people that stumble across this :)
